role: Data access layer for the ArchSpine system, providing repository objects for each domain entity.
responsibility: Collectively, these repositories manage all persistent data operations including file metadata, symbol index, semantic drift events, token usage logs, and architectural violation records, using SQLite as the backend.

children.role: Database repository (Data Access Object) for semantic drift events.
Database Repository (Data Access Object) providing low-level CRUD operations on the 'files' table in an SQLite database, isolating file metadata persistence for the ArchSpine runtime.
Data Access Object (DAO) for low-level SQLite operations on the symbols table. Provides CRUD and search against a persistent symbol index.
Infrastructure repository (DAO) for recording and querying LLM token usage logs in the SQLite database.
Data Access Object (DAO) for violation records in the SQLite-based index database.
